description: Seek playback to a specific position (seconds). The CommandRegistry validator (JsonValidator.validatePlaybackCommand) requires `position` to be a positive number before the handler runs. The handler forwards the value to `midiPlayer.seek()`.

cases.name: error — missing position (validator)
cases.notes: Validator emits both 'position is required' AND 'position must be a positive number' because typeof undefined !== 'number'. Both errors are joined by the CommandRegistry.

output_snapshot.error: Invalid playback_seek data: position is required, position must be a positive number
Invalid playback_seek data: position must be a positive number
